description: Required performance indexes for repeatable ValueOS semantic-memory and transactional hot paths.

indexes.name: idx_semantic_memory_embedding_hnsw
indexes.query_shape: organization-scoped ANN vector similarity ordered by embedding distance

indexes.name: idx_semantic_memory_metadata_gin
indexes.query_shape: organization-scoped metadata containment and provenance lookups

indexes.name: idx_semantic_memory_org_type_created
indexes.query_shape: organization_id = ? [AND type = ?] ORDER BY created_at DESC

indexes.name: idx_workflow_executions_org_status
indexes.query_shape: organization_id = ? AND status = ? ORDER BY created_at DESC

indexes.name: idx_workflow_executions_org_active_created
indexes.query_shape: organization_id = ? AND status IN (pending,in_progress,waiting_approval) ORDER BY created_at DESC

indexes.name: idx_workflow_execution_logs_org_execution_created
indexes.query_shape: organization_id = ? AND execution_id = ? ORDER BY created_at ASC|DESC

indexes.name: idx_prompt_executions_tenant_version
indexes.query_shape: tenant_id = ? AND prompt_version_id = ? ORDER BY created_at DESC

indexes.name: idx_agent_predictions_org_type_created
indexes.query_shape: organization_id = ? AND agent_type = ? ORDER BY created_at DESC

indexes.name: idx_audit_logs_tenant_resource_timestamp
indexes.query_shape: tenant_id = ? AND resource_type = ? AND timestamp BETWEEN ? AND ? ORDER BY timestamp DESC

indexes.name: idx_audit_logs_org_action_created
indexes.query_shape: organization_id = ? AND action IN (...) ORDER BY created_at DESC
